title: Why Inference is hard..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explores the technical depth of LLM inference, covering model loading techniques like memory mapping and multiple quantization methods including standard quantization, GGUF, AWQ, EXL2, FP8, and NVFP4. The video also discusses inference engines and their differences in pre-fill, decoding, and concurrent serving.
